description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for the PG-184 surface area. Captured retroactively via the check-exec-readiness preflight on 2026-04-16. All target files listed below were created DURING this task (iterations 3 and 4 added them); none existed prior to 2026-04-15T12:45:00Z. A true empirical baseline was therefore zero by construction — no file to measure coverage against.
command: npx vitest run apps/web/src/app/deals apps/api/src/modules/opportunity packages/validators --coverage --coverage.provider=istanbul --coverage.include='apps/web/src/app/deals/(list)/deal-settings/**' --coverage.include='apps/api/src/modules/opportunity/deal-settings.router.ts' --coverage.include='apps/api/src/modules/opportunity/deal-automation.ts' --coverage.include='packages/validators/src/deal-settings.ts'
notes: All PG-184 target files were newly created during exec; baseline is therefore empty by construction.

This file was written retroactively — the /exec-coverage before-capture step was skipped in exec iteration 3 because the check-exec-readiness preflight did not yet exist. The preflight is now wired so future tasks capture their before-snapshot at exec Phase 0.
After-coverage snapshot will be captured at plan step V-5b once all 7 deal-settings cards and the router are complete.
